"'''Stones'''" is a comic that appeared in [[Star Wars Tales 13|''Star Wars Tales'' 13]] and was collected in [[Star Wars Tales Volume 4|''Star Wars Tales'' Volume 4]] and ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Rise of the Sith Vol. 1]]''.

==Plot summary==
The story takes place on [[Hurikane]] where a 14 year old [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] seeks the crystals for his very first [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] on his very first solo mission.

{{Plot|comic}}
